title: lippia sellowii
intro: Lippia sellowii, also known as Lippia, is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family, native to South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lippia sellowii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever and pain. Lippia sellowii is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used topically in the form of creams or ointments to soothe skin irritations.
